name: recipe2video-remotion-export
//: Standalone worker package: installed by 'npm ci' inside the Vercel Sandbox (cwd=remotion-export). Pinned exact versions so the lockfile is deterministic and the sandbox snapshot we will introduce in PR-B step 2 can be reused safely. React is required at runtime by '@remotion/renderer' (it spins up a JSDOM-less React renderer to walk the composition tree).
